title: Feet of Clay
writer: Beulah Marie Dix, Bertram Millhauser, Margaretta Tuttle
actors: Vera Reynolds, Rod La Rocque, Julia Faye
plot: Kerry falls in love with Amy and saves her life in a surfboard race though his foot is bitten by a shark. Dr. Lansell tells him to keep off his foot for a year. He weds Amy, but Dr. Lansell's wife Bertha wants him too.
